element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player learns dodge patterns and firing rhythm
pattern recognition and sustained fire discipline

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: wave-based escalation with cyclical intensity; each stage introduces denser formations until boss encounter provides climactic tension release

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduces core mechanics gradually with forgiving enemy spacing
difficulty_curve.mid_game: density and speed increase; environmental complexity rises; requires pattern prediction
difficulty_curve.late_game: sustained pressure with minimal safe zones; boss patterns demand precision and multi-threat awareness
notable_spikes: stage 4+: combined hazard and enemy density

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level begins sparse, gradually building enemy count and formation complexity toward mid-stage boss encounter
Weapon upgrades dropped strategically after enemy waves to provide tactical moment of agency
Playfield structured as forward-moving horizontal progression with minimal vertical depth variation

extraction_notes: TCRF source provided only navigation/meta-content wrapper; no actual Gunforce II documentation found. All analysis draws from shmup paradigm conventions and T3 qualitative inference. Boss structure, stage progression, and enemy introduction pacing inferred from typical SNES-era shmup architecture rather than specific source documentation.
